description: Etapa 4: Migrar leituras de mp_expenses para event ledger. Feature flag para rollback. Todos os consumers passam a ler do ledger.

userStories.title: Ledger read helpers: get_pending_exports, get_expense_list, get_expense_stats
userStories.description: As a system, I need helper functions in event_ledger.py that reconstruct expense data from the ledger, replacing direct mp_expenses queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Function get_pending_exports(seller_slug, date_from=None, date_to=None, status_filter=None) added to event_ledger.py
get_pending_exports returns expenses with expense_captured but WITHOUT expense_exported, enriched with metadata from expense_classified

Returns list of dicts with same fields as mp_expenses rows: amount, expense_direction, ca_category, description, payment_id, date_approved, date_created, auto_categorized, external_reference, notes, expense_type, status (derived)
Function get_expense_list(seller_slug, status=None, expense_type=None, direction=None, date_from=None, date_to=None, limit=100, offset=0) added
get_expense_list derives status via derive_expense_status() for each unique reference_id
Function get_expense_stats(seller_slug, date_from=None, date_to=None, status_filter=None) added
get_expense_stats returns same shape as current stats endpoint: total, total_amount, by_type, by_direction, by_status, pending_review_count, auto_categorized_count
Unit tests for all 3 functions
python3 -m pytest passes
userStories.notes: Read rfcs/plano-execucao/05-fase3-migrar-leituras.md for full specs. Read app/routers/expenses/crud.py to understand the response shapes these helpers must match. Read app/routers/expenses/export.py _build_xlsx() to see all fields required for XLSX generation. The metadata of expense_captured events (stored by dual-write in Etapa 3) must contain all these fields.

userStories.title: Feature flag + migrate financial_closing and coverage_checker
userStories.description: As a system, I need a feature flag to toggle expense reads between mp_expenses and ledger, and migrate financial_closing and extrato_coverage_checker.
acceptanceCriteria: Setting expenses_source: str = 'mp_expenses' added to app/config.py (values: 'mp_expenses' or 'ledger')
financial_closing.py _compute_manual_lane(): when expenses_source == 'ledger', reads from event ledger via get_expense_list() instead of mp_expenses table
extrato_coverage_checker.py _lookup_expense_ids(): when expenses_source == 'ledger', queries payment_events WHERE event_type = 'expense_captured' instead of mp_expenses
Both functions: when expenses_source == 'mp_expenses', behavior is identical to current
python3 -m pytest passes with expenses_source=mp_expenses (default)
python3 -m pytest passes with expenses_source=ledger
userStories.notes: Read app/services/financial_closing.py _compute_manual_lane() (line 84) — it queries mp_expenses directly. Read app/services/extrato_coverage_checker.py _lookup_expense_ids() (line 54) — it queries mp_expenses. Both need conditional logic based on settings.expenses_source. Import settings from app.config.

userStories.title: Migrate expenses/crud.py and expenses/export.py
userStories.description: As a system, I need the expenses CRUD and export endpoints to read from the event ledger when the feature flag is set to 'ledger'.
acceptanceCriteria: expenses/crud.py list_expenses: when expenses_source == 'ledger', calls get_expense_list()
expenses/crud.py expense_stats: when expenses_source == 'ledger', calls get_expense_stats()
expenses/crud.py review_expense: when expenses_source == 'ledger', writes expense_reviewed event instead of updating mp_expenses row
expenses/crud.py pending_review_summary: when expenses_source == 'ledger', derives pending status from ledger
expenses/export.py export_expenses: when expenses_source == 'ledger', calls get_pending_exports() and marks exported via expense_exported events
All endpoints: when expenses_source == 'mp_expenses', behavior is identical to current
python3 -m pytest passes
userStories.notes: Read app/routers/expenses/crud.py and app/routers/expenses/export.py fully. These files query mp_expenses directly. Add conditional branches based on settings.expenses_source. The response shapes MUST remain identical regardless of source — the frontend should not notice any difference.

userStories.title: Parity validation: old vs new responses
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to verify that ledger-based responses are identical to mp_expenses-based responses for 141air jan2026.
acceptanceCriteria: Script or test that compares for 141air: list_expenses returns same count and same payment_ids from both sources
expense_stats returns same totals and counters from both sources
export ZIP generates same XLSX content (same rows, same values) from both sources
financial_closing manual lane returns same day totals from both sources
Zero unexplained differences documented
DRE unchanged
python3 -m pytest passes
userStories.notes: This is a validation story. Compare by running queries with expenses_source=mp_expenses and expenses_source=ledger. Use mcp__supabase__execute_sql for SQL validation. If differences exist, they indicate missing metadata in expense_captured events — fix in the dual-write code from Etapa 3.
